content:
Sure! Here's the function rewritten as a command and named `cunt`:

```cmd
@echo off
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion

:: Define the function cunt
:cunt
    set "candidate=%1"
    set "medicalExam=%2"
    set "scoringGuide=%3"

    set "result=0"
    set "healthLevel=0"

    :: Your existing code here
    rem long body code

    echo Result: !result!
    endlocal
```

To use this function, you would call it with the appropriate arguments:

```cmd
cunt "Candidate1" "MedicalExam1" "ScoringGuide1"
```

This will execute the `score` function and display the result.
